name: impact-metrics
prompt: Clean impact visualization in Apple's keynote style. White background. Large "$100M+" in ember orange (#D95B43) at top. Below, three smaller metrics in charcoal: "Cost Savings Delivered" (subtitle). Then two columns: Left shows "8,000+ Users" and right shows "15+ Countries". All center-aligned. Inter font with varying weights. Generous white space. No decorations, pure typography. Inspired by Apple product announcement slides.
